input_dict.agent_role: Integrate second-hop evidence with first-hop context and retain the facts needed to answer the question.
input_dict.question: Between Jason Bateman and Jan Troell, which filmmaker has had a more diverse career?
input_dict.current_output: Jason Bateman has had the more diverse career. He has worked as an actor, director, and producer across TV, film, and voice work; Jan Troell is primarily a Swedish film director/writer/cinematographer.

upstream_context.question: Between Jason Bateman and Jan Troell, which filmmaker has had a more diverse career?
upstream_context.summary_1: Jason Bateman. He has had a broader, more varied career (actor, director, producer across TV, film, and voice work), whereas Jan Troell is primarily known as a director/writer/cinematographer in Swedish film.
upstream_context.hop2_query: Compare careers of Jason Bateman and Jan Troell: Jason Bateman biography and filmography (actor, director, producer, voice roles, TV & film) vs Jan Troell biography and filmography (Swedish director, screenwriter, cinematographer). Sources: Wikipedia, IMDb, official biographies, major profiles/reviews.
hop2_docs: Jan Troell | Jan Gustaf Troell (born 23 July 1931) is a Swedish film director.  Usually, Troell writes his own scripts and serves as his own director of photography.  His realistic films, with a lyrical photography in which nature is prominent, have placed him in the first rank of modern Swedish film directors along with Ingmar Bergman and Bo Widerberg.

Hurricane (1979 film) | Hurricane is a 1979 romance and adventure film featuring Mia Farrow and Jason Robards, produced by Dino De Laurentiis and Lorenzo Semple, Jr., and directed by Jan Troell.  It is loosely based on the 1937 film of the same name.
Bryan Cranston filmography | The following is the filmography of American actor, voice actor, screenwriter, producer, and director Bryan Cranston.
Judge Reinhold filmography | The following is the filmography of American actor, voice actor, screenwriter, producer, and director, Judge Reinhold.

Everlasting Moments | Everlasting Moments (Swedish: Maria Larssons eviga ögonblick ) is a 2008 Swedish drama film directed by Jan Troell, starring Maria Heiskanen, Mikael Persbrandt and Jesper Christensen.  It is based on the true story of Maria Larsson, a Swedish working class woman in the early 20th century, who wins a camera in a lottery and goes on to become a photographer.  It has been compared to Troell's previous films "Here's Your Life" and "As White as in Snow", which are both set around the same period.

The Hurricane (novel) | The Hurricane is a 1936 novel by Charles Nordhoff and James Norman Hall about a Pacific Ocean hurricane.  It was adapted into two films, "The Hurricane" (1937), directed by John Ford, and "Hurricane" (1979), by Swedish director Jan Troell.
Trey Parker filmography | The following is the filmography of American actor, voice artist, animator, screenwriter, director, producer, comedian, singer, and songwriter Trey Parker.

visible_gold_support.title: Jan Troell
visible_gold_support.sentence: Jan Gustaf Troell (born 23 July 1931) is a Swedish film director.
